description:
2025 BMW X3 M50 XDrive, 3.0 TC I6, 4WD, 393bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 289,000 or AED 4,528 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage Only 34,286 KM's - BMW Warranty Valid Until 23rd February 2030 or 200,000 KM's - BMW Service Contract Valid Until 23rd February 2030 or 100,000 KM's - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Brooklyn Grey - M Sport 2 Tone Alloy Wheels - M Sport Package - Harmon Kardon Surround Sound Speakers - Panoramic Glass Roof - M Sport Seats - M Seat Belts - Ambient Lighting - Driving Assistant - Reversing Camera - Front & Rear Parking Sensors - Apple CarPlay - Bluetooth Connectivity - Satellite Navigation - M Sport Suspension - M Leather Steering Wheel - M Aerodynamics Package - BMW Shadowline Exterior Trim
